reference: I have had stomach pain on both sides and above my belly button. I took aspirin, to be exact, low dose aspirin, and I took some Pepto-Bismol. The next day it went away, and I had two bowel movements. The following day I have had none. Should I be worried?
text: I have had stomach pain on both sides and above my belly button. I took aspirin, to be exact, low-dose aspirin, and I took some Pepto-Bismol. The next day it went away, and I had two bowel movements. The following day I have had none. Should I be worried?
